expectations.text: Phases are annotated with sprint numbers
expectations.evidence: No sprint annotations. Plain sequential phase list.

expectations.text: At least one sprint has 2+ parallel phases
expectations.evidence: All 6 phases sequential: 1->2->3->4->5->6. Phase 5 'Administration' depends on Phase 1, could have been parallel with Phases 3-4 but wasn't.

expectations.text: Core CRUD API is available early
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 'Core API & Authentication' is the first phase

expectations.text: Event ingestion and ETA engine are separate phases
expectations.evidence: ETA computation and Geofencing are combined in Phase 4 'Location Intelligence'. These are distinct subsystems that were merged.

expectations.text: Multi-region deployment is in a later sprint
expectations.evidence: Multi-region is in Phase 6 (last phase), though data retention is bundled with it.
